code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (Education_GradeSync)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (Education_GradeSync)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下GradeSync系统的版本发布流程。目前main分支上已经有v1.0.0的稳定版本，现在准备开始1.1.0的开发。我想先建一个release/1分支来做第一轮准备。
明白，release/1从main切出来，order设为2。然后在release/1上打两个post commit，分别是1.0.1-rc.1.post.1和post.2，这样？
对，但这里有个特殊情况。Education团队需要同步做另一个发布准备，我们要从release/1的第二个commit再拉一个release/2分支出来，order设为1，让它在图里显示在release/1上方。
好的，release/2从release/1的post.2切出，先打一个commit 1.0.1-rc.2.post.3。然后回到release/1继续？
没错，release/1这边要模拟一个真实场景——第三个commit会引入问题，所以标记为1.0.1-rc.1.post.3，还要打个tag叫"issues found"。
收到，release/1现在有三个commit，最后一个带问题标记。那release/2那边呢，继续走成功路径？
是的，release/2不受那个问题影响，再打第四个commit 1.0.1-rc.2.post.4完成准备。最后合并回main，发布v1.1.0。
完成了。main分支合并release/2，生成1.1.0 commit并打上v1.1.0 tag。这样整个流程就清晰展示了：release/1虽然先启动但遇到问题，release/2后启动反而成功发布了。
